result.stdout:
Description:
  .NET tool used to generate DraftKings lineups.

Usage:
  DraftKings.LineupGenerator.Console [options]

Options:
  -c, --contestId <contestId> (REQUIRED)    [REQUIRED] The DraftKings contest identifier.
  -iq, --include-questionable               [default=false] Includes draftables with a questionable status.
  -ibs, --include-base-salary               [default=false] Includes draftables with the base salary (lowest possible).
  -mp, --min-fppg <min-fppg>                (Classic Only) [default=10.0] Minimum fantasy points per game (per player - excluding defense & kickers). [default: 10.0]
  -ed, --exclude-defense                    (Showdown Only) [default: false] Excludes DST positions from lineups.
  -ek, --exclude-kickers                    (Showdown Only) [default=false] Excludes Kicker positions from lineups.
  -f, --output-format <output-format>       [default=text] The console output format. One of (json | text) [default: text]
  -lc, --lineup-count <lineup-count>        [default=5] The number of lineups to output for each generator (max is 100). [default: 5]
  -g, --give-me <give-me>                   The names of players to include in generated lineups (comma delimited)
  -ep, --exclude-player <exclude-player>    The names of players to exclude in generated lineups (comma delimited)
  -gc, --give-me-captain <give-me-captain>  (Showdown Only) The names of captain players to include in generated lineups (comma delimited)
  -ec, --exclude-captain <exclude-captain>  (Showdown Only) The names of captain players to exclude in generated lineups (comma delimited)
  --version                                 Show version information
  -?, -h, --help                            Show help and usage information
